sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἅγιος

- Transliteration: Hagios

- Phonetic: hag'-ee-os

- Definition:

1. most holy thing, a saint

- Origin: from hagos (an awful thing) [cf G53, H2282]

- TDNT entry: 02:28,1

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From ἅγος hagos (an awful thing) compare G53 [H2282]; sacred (physically pure morally blameless or religious ceremonially consecrated): - (most) holy (one thing) saint.
